name: Aisha Tyler
blurb: A Dartmouth graduate, she is widely known for voicing Lana Kane on Archer, recurring on Friends, hosting Whose Line Is It Anyway, and co-hosting The Talk.
bio: Aisha Tyler is an American actress, comedian, and host who returned to stand-up after building a screen career, releasing the 2009 Comedy Central special Aisha Tyler Is Lit: Live at the Fillmore. A Dartmouth graduate, she is widely known for voicing Lana Kane on Archer, recurring on Friends, hosting Whose Line Is It Anyway, and co-hosting The Talk. Her stand-up favors sharp, geeky observational riffs.

timeline.ev: Recurs as Charlie Wheeler on Friends
Releases Comedy Central special Aisha Tyler Is Lit
Begins voicing Lana Kane on FX's Archer
Begins hosting Whose Line Is It Anyway

accolades: Daytime Emmy Award winner as co-host of The Talk
Comedy Central special Aisha Tyler Is Lit: Live at the Fillmore (2009)

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Two embeddable official stand-up clips verified, both on the genuine Just For Laughs official channel (@justforlaughs) — matching her logged 'Just For Laughs(2015,tv)' appearance. Below the 3-clip minimum. Her special 'Aisha Tyler Is Lit: Live at the Fillmore'(2009) exists on YouTube ONLY as fan re-uploads (channels 'S C', 'YourUpdate', 'MyTalkShowHeroes', '#FML/15 Minutes of Fame', 'NPTheAmpersand') and embed-disabled/missing uploads — no official Comedy Central / Comedy Dynamics / Netflix YouTube upload of the special found, so none added. Note: the vanity URL youtube.com/c/AishaTylerNow redirects to the fan channel 'S C', not a verified official channel. IG verified official (@aishatyler, 200). Website aishatyler.com responds (406 to bots) but could not be cleanly verified as her active official site, so omitted. Honest gap.

bits.yt_title: Aisha Tyler - The Difference Between Being 25 & 30
